issues.description: Trigger is 'OnBlock' but card text says 'When this Character becomes rested by your opponent's Character's effect' — should be 'Counter' (triggered when opponent's effect attempts to rest this character)
Missing condition to verify the resting effect is from opponent's Character effect — should have condition checking opponent source
Action is 'ReturnToHand' but card says 'return 1 DON!! card from your field to your DON!! deck' — should be 'TrashFromHand' or similar DON deck return mechanic, not return to hand
Target is 'Self' (this Character) but effect should target a DON!! card on field, not the Character itself
Missing second action: 'set this Character as active' — requires 'Rest' action with value false or equivalent 'activate' action
Effect should be optional ('you may') — missing optional flag or conditional wrapper
